title: 2025-09-29 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 7.58
description: Today’s retreat-pressure snapshot for 2025-09-29: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 7.58/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and equity stress shaped the daily read. See the chart pack, score regime, and what drove the latest reading.
hero_summary: The index is designed to approximate how market stress can build pressure for a softer policy posture. On 2025-09-29, the score printed 7.58/100 in the low regime, with volatility and equity stress doing most of the work.
